vuln.title: What could be wrong here?
vuln.lead: Search the technique catalog offline-first; opt in to a live CVE lookup when you meet an unfamiliar technology.
vuln.placeholder: Product, error, or technique… e.g. "MOVEit SQL injection"
vuln.noResults: No matches — try a broader term.
defense.title: Harden a codebase you own.
defense.lead: Review a project directory for the catalogued vulnerability classes, then map each finding to concrete secure-implementation guidance.
defense.placeholder: Absolute path to the project to review
defense.noFindings: No catalogued weaknesses matched the signature set.
defense.authNote: For projects you own or are authorized to assess. Findings are proposals, not automatic changes.
labs.title: Read → practise → automate.
labs.lead: Sandboxed, intentionally-vulnerable targets — simulated against in-memory data, bound to localhost, on a separate port.
labs.disabled: Labs are disabled by default. Enable with SECFORGE_LABS_ENABLED=1 and restart.
common.backendDown: Could not reach the SecForge backend.
